eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN IMMEDIATE EVACUATION NOTICE for the following counties or areas: Roseau, MN; at 06:44 AM ON MAR 28, 2026 Effective until 12:44 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: A train has derailed nearby with a possible unknown leak. Residents are advised to evacuate as a precaution. Patch Motel meeting point.  Please follow direction from 1st responders.
